review_criteria: Verify the final review packet includes the V0.7 Governance Breach and Ratification Packet reference.
Verify the packet includes the proposed ratification decision text.
Verify the packet includes the exact proposed diff for documentation/AI_GUIDES/SYSTEM_PROMPT.md.
Verify the packet includes the proposed before/after states for workflow/dispatch.json and workflow/iteration-state.json.
Verify the packet provides a written rationale explaining why the proposed changes should be ratified instead of rolled back.
Verify that NO active implementation files, workflow states, or governance rules were modified; the packet serves strictly as a draft proposal.
